zh.lifeSummary: Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar是de Harcourt of de Mar和Malcolm, de Braose,  de Warenne的女兒，於大約1133年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾申頓。她於1145年與Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1170年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克享年38歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar是de Harcourt of de Mar和Malcolm, de Braose,  de Warenne的女儿，于大约1133年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾申頓。她于1145年与Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar在苏格兰費伏登福姆林结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1170年在苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克享年38岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar was born about 1133, in Shenton, Leicestershire, England as the daughter of de Harcourt of de Mar and Malcolm, de Braose,  de Warenne. She married Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar in 1145, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1170, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 38, and was buried in Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar est née environ 1133, à Shenton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, fille de de Harcourt of de Mar et Malcolm, de Braose,  de Warenne. Elle a épousé Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar en 1145, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1170, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar wurde um 1133 in Shenton, Leicestershire, England, als Tochter von de Harcourt of de Mar und Malcolm, de Braose,  de Warenne geboren. Sie hat 1145 in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1170 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar è nata il circa 1133 nel Shenton, Leicestershire, England come figlia di de Harcourt of de Mar e Malcolm, de Braose,  de Warenne. Lei sposato Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar nel 1145, nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1170, nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Marは約1133年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアシェントンでde Harcourt of de MarとMalcolm, de Braose,  de Warenneの娘として生まれた。1145年にスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインでMorggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Marと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1170年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックで38歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar(은)는 대략 1133년 영국 레이스스터실르 셰턴에서 de Harcourt of de Mar(와)과 Malcolm, de Braose,  de Warenne의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1145년 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1170년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar nasceu aproximadamente 1133, em Shenton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra filha de de Harcourt of de Mar e Malcolm, de Braose,  de Warenne. Ela casou-se com Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar em 1145, em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1170, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar родилась около 1133 г. в местности шентон, лисестиршир, Англия. Её родителей звали de Harcourt of de Mar и Malcolm, de Braose,  de Warenne. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar в 1145 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1170 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности фиф, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar nació aproximadamente 1133, en Shenton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra como hija de de Harcourt of de Mar y Malcolm, de Braose,  de Warenne. Se casó con Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar en 1145, en Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1170, en Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Fife, Scotland.
